rulings.Case Title: JOHN S. KARLS VS. MELLON CAPITAL MANAGEMENT CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 8, 2009, line 12, DEFENDANT MELLON CAPITAL MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, MELLON FINANCIAL SERVICES CORPORATION #1, MELLON LEASING CORPORATION, and, MELLON VENTURES, INC. rulings.Case Title: JOHN S. KARLS VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, September 8, 2009, line 13, DEFENDANT BNY MELLON PERFORMANCE & RISK ANALYTICS, INC., MELLON CAPITAL MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, MELLON FINANCIAL SERVICES CORPORATION #1, MELLON LEASING CORPORATION, MELLON VENTURES, INC., MBSC SECURITIES CORPORATION, URDANG CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, INC., and, THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No opposition filed. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend.
